description: Maps eligible partner frame IDs to mirror topic keys. Core mirror entries are derived from these frames at startup and prepended before mirror_questions.json discovery entries. Only slot-free partner frames are eligible. To add a core mirror question: add one entry here — no frame JSON changes needed. If the topic key is new, also add a branch to _mirror_persona_stub and any required discoverable_facts keys to persona JSON.

core_entries._note: 你叫什么名字？ — opening identity question
朋友一般怎么叫你？ — nickname/call-name
你现在住哪里？ — current city
你老家在哪儿？ — hometown (distinct from place_from)
你做什么工作？ — work opener (deduplicates discovery entry)
你在哪个公司上班？ — which company/workplace
你怎么开始做这个工作的？ — career origin
你喜欢做什么？有什么特别的爱好？ — hobby opener (deduplicates discovery entry)
你最喜欢这个爱好的哪一点？ — best part of hobby
你是怎么开始这个爱好的？ — hobby origin
你去过哪里？ — travel opener (deduplicates discovery entry)
你是跟谁一起去的？ — travel companion
你结婚了吗？ — reciprocal offer after learner answers
你有孩子吗？ — reciprocal offer after learner answers
你跟家人住在一起吗？ — reciprocal offer after learner answers
你跟家人住在一起吗？ — first family-engine frame; natural wording variant
哪次旅行最难忘？ — travel depth; bank topic travel_memorable
你做这个工作多久了？ — work tenure; bank topic work_duration
你多大了？ — persona opened topic; learner may ask back

reciprocal_aliases._note: 你是哪里人？ — slotted (CITY fill); alias only for reciprocal card lookup. Live frame behavior is unchanged.
